title: Prima Laundry 4 Fold Dryer Airer Rack Washing Home Garment Clothes Stand, Metal, White, 8 Metres
features: Versatile Indoor and Outdoor Use: Perfect for drying clothes both indoors and outdoors, providing maximum flexibility no matter the weather.
Expansive Drying Space: Offers an impressive 8 metres of drying space, accommodating a large number of garments, towels, and linens at once.
Compact and Foldable Design: Folds down to a compact size of 51 cm (W) x 110 cm (H) for convenient storage, ideal for homes with limited space.
Durable and Safe Coating: Features a sleek white coated finish that is non-toxic, ensuring the safety of all fabrics and providing long-lasting durability.
Easy to Use and Store: Quickly extends to 207 cm (W) x 110 cm (H) when in use and folds away just as easily, making laundry tasks efficient and hassle-free.
description: Introducing our 4-Fold Indoor and Outdoor Folding Clothes Airer, the ultimate drying solution for all your laundry needs. Designed for both indoor and outdoor use, this airer combines maximum drying space with convenience and durability. Whether you're dealing with a large load of laundry or just a few items, our 4-Fold Indoor and Outdoor Folding Clothes Airer is the perfect solution. Enjoy the benefits of air drying your clothes, saving energy, and maintaining the quality of your fabrics.
